raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "black_cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm has direct frontal access to the cup, the surface in front of the cup is clear, and pushing it forward will not cause it to collide with the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is displaced forward, creating a clear frontal workspace in front of both boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "darker_box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box’s left and right sides are unobstructed after the cup has been pushed away; both arms can approach laterally and the lighter box to its right will not hinder symmetric grasping.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted slightly above the tabletop, ready for further manipulation or relocation."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm has direct frontal access to the cup, the surface in front of the cup is clear, and pushing it forward will not cause it to collide with the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is displaced forward, creating a clear frontal workspace in front of both boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box’s left and right sides are unobstructed after the cup has been pushed away; both arms can approach laterally and the lighter box to its right will not hinder symmetric grasping.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted slightly above the tabletop, ready for further manipulation or relocation.
